sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36140" key="e)/nswmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνσωμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n36140.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐνσώματος, ἐ. φράσις</ref> </xr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">materialistic</tr_> language, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> </bibl> Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.228B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.228B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
